think.notes: PRD reverse review complete. Phase-A boundary corrected. Spectra proposal/design/spec/tasks complete; analyze clean; validate pass. G1 technical checklist re-audited 6/6. Human sign-off received.

plan.notes: Phase-A Spectra proposal, design, delta spec, and 13-task plan complete and archived.

build.notes: Focused hardened suite 35/35 and tsc pass. Scope guard pass. No dependency added. Semgrep/Trivy unavailable; three-lens Spectra audit used and all high findings fixed.

review.notes: Spec and standards review complete. Full suite baseline: 100 pass, 30 unrelated Windows/Bash harness failures.

test.notes: G2 pending (human sign-off only). Dependency tree restored; focused tests 35/35 and type-check pass. Scoped Stryker rerun 2026-07-19 (correct epic-scoped config; the 57.50% figure was from the wrong top-level stryker.conf.json): 1,432 mutants, 86.07% score, 1207 killed, 29 timed out, 196 survived, 4 no-coverage, 0 errors. Per-file: pl-scope-guard.mjs 100%, contracts.ts 100%, pl-contract-check.mjs 86.81%, pl-arch-check.mjs 85.15%, gen-scenarios.mjs 85.12% -- all clear the 85% break threshold. Surviving mutants reviewed: mostly deep tokenizer/lexer internal boundary arithmetic and genuinely-equivalent sort-comparator removals (final output is independently re-sorted downstream), documented per-file in test file commit messages. One real defect found and documented (not fixed, out of scope): compileGlob's mid-path '**' segment can never match any file at any depth due to a redundant '/' from the segment join -- flagged to human separately. npm audit --omit=dev: 0 vulnerabilities. Manual e2e verification 2026-07-18: installed package into a real external end-user project, ran pl-enforcement-kernel, output matched expected.

G1.notes: Technical checklist re-audited after PRD/Spectra refresh: parser subset fail-closed, path containment, no source evaluation, project-relative diagnostics, host-neutral Phase-A golden outputs, src-only blast radius, rollback by file removal/revert. 6/6 technical checks pass. Human approved G1; approval covers planning Phase A only, not implementation, Phase B, or dogfood activation.

G2.notes: Only human_sign_off remains. Mutation score 86.07% overall (all 5 files individually clear 85%), survivors reviewed and categorized (deep lexer boundary cases, equivalent sort-comparator mutants), dependency rescan clean (0 vulns). Full integration baseline still has 30 non-Phase-A Windows/Bash failures (unrelated, pre-existing). One real (non-blocking) defect found in compileGlob's mid-path '**' handling -- documented in test file, not fixed, flagged to human for a decision.
